calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Certain Asset Is Trust Property
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number 282000 Conservatorship of Caroline Mota.

Appearances: Karen Mitchell for Caroline Mota. Lawrence Siracusa for Scott Hodges (Conservator).

Mr. Siracusa stated that he had no objection to the petition. Ms. Mitchell stated that the property was taken out of the Trust in 2001 and put into the Conservatorship for the purpose of the Conservator obtaining a loan on the property as the lender required the deed be in the name of an individual. In addition, Ms. Mitchell stated the Conservatee owned the property, that she was the Settlor and the Trustee of the Trust and that the 2001 Trust was based on the dispositve provisions of the 1995 Trust. Mr. Siracusa stated that the 1% guideline with regard to fees was appropriate and that property has been managed by his Client, not the Trustee. The Petition for Order Confirming Certain Asset is Trust Property was taken under submission. The accounting petition is to be continued (date to be determined).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
